seriesDescription: Short articles on ethical AI frameworks, governance, and practice—aligned with the Ethical AI Frameworks LinkedIn group.

articles.title: Human Override Rules for AI Systems: Who Can Stop What, and When
articles.summary: Define clear override authority and escalation paths before production pressure makes decisions for you.

articles.title: An Ethical AI Risk Register Template You Can Maintain in 15 Minutes
articles.summary: A lightweight register design for teams that need traceability without adding heavy governance overhead.

articles.title: The Minimum Ethical AI Release Checklist (That Teams Actually Use)
articles.summary: A concise pre-release checklist for AI features: ownership, evidence, user impact, and rollback readiness.

articles.title: From NIST AI RMF to a Two-Pizza Team Backlog
articles.summary: Map Govern, Map, Measure, and Manage to concrete stories so a small team does not drown in abstraction.

articles.title: A Framework Is Not a Values Poster: What Teams Should Document
articles.summary: Wallpaper test, poster vs framework table, four-step decision map, audit checklist—so ethics ties to owners, tickets, and evidence, not slogans.
